# UAE PDPL Executive Regulations

Jurisdiction: United Arab Emirates
Region: AE
Citation: Executive Regulations for Federal Decree-Law No. 45 of 2021
Authority: UAE Data Office
Source URL: https://ai.gov.ae/personal-data-protection-law/
Topics: consent, notice_transparency, data_subject_rights, cross_border_transfer, security_breach
Keywords: UAE PDPL executive regulations, data office, controller, processor

## Summary
Implementation layer for UAE PDPL covering notices, rights, controls, and transfer mechanisms where issued or referenced by UAE authorities.

## Key compliance obligations
- Track executive-regulation requirements for PDPL implementation.
- Map controller, processor, and DPO duties.
- Assess transfer and breach handling rules.
